slides.title: Your waist can *beat the scale*.
slides.sub: Waist size often predicts health risk better than BMI. A simple tape measure tells you a lot.

slides.title: Waist beats BMI
slides.body: Waist size often predicts health risk *better than BMI*, because where you carry fat really matters.

slides.title: The dangerous kind
slides.body: Visceral fat, the kind packed *around your organs*, is the type most strongly linked to long-term risk.

slides.title: A tape tells you
slides.body: A simple tape measure around the waist *tracks it over time*, no clinic or fancy scan required.

slides.title: Habits move it
slides.body: It responds to sleep, steps, protein and *less ultra-processed food* and alcohol, the everyday basics done well.

slides.title: No spot reducing
slides.body: You cannot target one area, so *overall habits shrink it*. Consistency, not crunches, is what moves the tape.

slides.title: Track the number that *really matters*.
slides.body: Vibe Health scores the sleep, steps, food and movement behind a healthy waist, all in one calm daily number.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Your waist can beat the scale. Waist size often predicts health risk better than BMI, because visceral fat around your organs is the dangerous kind. 📏

A simple tape measure tracks it, and it responds to sleep, steps, protein and less ultra-processed food and alcohol. You can't spot-reduce, so overall habits shrink it. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns those daily habits into one calm score → link in bio.
youtube_title: Why Your Waist Can Beat BMI for Health
